reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(4)(i) focuses on information access management, which aligns with Kubernetes RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) mechanisms. In Kubernetes, managing access to resources is crucial to ensure that users and service accounts have only the permissions they need. This is similar to IAM roles and policies in cloud environments. The suggested checks ensure that no overly permissive roles like 'cluster-admin' are bound to users unnecessarily, enforce least privilege principles, and manage service account tokens securely.
title: 164_308_a_4_i: 164.308(a)(4)(i) Information access management
